headline: Is NVR (NVR) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pause?
summary: If you are wondering whether NVR at around US$7,415.75 a share still offers fair value or is pricing in too much optimism, you are not alone. The stock has been relatively steady recently, with a 0.6% decline over the last 7 days and a 2.9% decline over 30 days, while returns sit at 1.9% year to date, 3.0% over 1 year, 41.4% over 3 years, and 57.8% over 5 years. Recent coverage of NVR has focused on its position in the US homebuilding and mortgage markets and how the share price performance...
